ul.li: Instruction Length: Hard limit of 15 bytes. If prefixes + encoding exceeds 15, CPU triggers #UD.
Legacy Prefixes: Include Lock (F0), Repeat (F2, F3), Segment Overrides (2E, 36, etc.).
REX: Mandatory for 64-bit operand width or accessing R8-R15 registers. Must precede Opcode.
ModR/M & SIB: Only present if the Opcode requires memory/register addressing.
Displacement/Immediate: Encoded in Little-Endian byte order.

div.p: Byte 0 ... Byte 1 ... Byte 2 ... Byte N ... Byte 15
